app.title: PawWalk Academy
app.subtitle: Interactive courses — build the PawWalk app step by step
course.picker.title: PawWalk Academy
course.picker.subtitle: Interactive courses — build the PawWalk app step by step
sidebar.reset.confirm: Reset all course progress? This can't be undone.
sidebar.import.confirm: Replace current progress with the imported file?
lesson.blocked: Finish the step above to keep going
lesson.complete.title: Lesson complete: {title}
lesson.complete.body: Nice work. Keep the streak going.
review.title: Review
review.none.body: Come back later, or keep going with the course.
review.due.count: {count} due · quizzes you've answered come back on a schedule
step.quiz.wrong.title: Not quite
step.quiz.wrong.hint: Think about it and try another answer.
step.exercise.success: That's exactly right. On to the next step!
step.exercise.fail: Compare your code with the instructions again.
step.exercise.solution.title: Solution
step.exercise.solution.hint: Type it out yourself (don't paste) — then hit Check my code. Typing is how it sticks.
step.xcode.skip: I'll do this on my Mac later — continue anyway
error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please refresh the page or try again.
map.title: Curriculum map
